response.name: New user CCBP credit card journey
response.steps:
Open the app as a new Credit Card BBPS user (no saved card yet).
User can start the journey without already having a paid bill on the home list.
Log in with mobile and complete OTP.
Login succeeds; session is established.
Complete profile / details step the app needs before BBPS (name, email, etc., as your onboarding shows).
Update is accepted; user can proceed (no blocking validation error).
Open BBPS from the dashboard / entry you use for bill pay.
BBPS (Credit Card) entry is available; user lands on the Credit Card BBPS area.
View Credit Card home for a new user.
No saved cards yet (empty list), ₹0 total due, StashGuard off, no gold reward claimed — a clear “add / set up” style empty state.
Open bureau / suggested cards (if your UI shows this step).
Screen loads successfully but no bureau-sourced cards yet for this new user (empty state).
Open customer / BBPS profile in app terms.
Profile shows a real user (name, email, mobile); new CCBP flow flag is on if your product shows it.
Browse supported banks / billers for Credit Card BBPS.
List of providers is not empty; user can pick a bank/biller to continue.
Pick card type / network (Visa, Mastercard, etc.).
Variants screen shows popular and other options and major networks (e.g. Visa, Mastercard).
Open biller details for the chosen bank.
Details match the chosen biller; fields required to fetch a bill (e.g. last 4 digits, mobile) are shown.
Enter card last 4 and registered mobile (and any other asked fields) and fetch bill.
Bill is found; due amount and status look valid; user is no longer on a completely empty bill list.
View “my bills” / utilities list after fetch.
At least one Credit Card bill appears for this user; it matches the bill they just fetched.

User can start the journey without already having a paid bill on the home list.
Log in with mobile and complete OTP.
Login succeeds; session is established.

Open bureau / suggested cards (if your UI shows this step).
Screen loads successfully but no bureau-sourced cards yet for this new user (empty state).
Open customer / BBPS profile in app terms.
Profile shows a real user (name, email, mobile); new CCBP flow flag is on if your product shows it.
Browse supported banks / billers for Credit Card BBPS.
List of providers is not empty; user can pick a bank/biller to continue.
Pick card type / network (Visa, Mastercard, etc.).
Variants screen shows popular and other options and major networks (e.g. Visa, Mastercard).
Open biller details for the chosen bank.
Details match the chosen biller; fields required to fetch a bill (e.g. last 4 digits, mobile) are shown.
Enter card last 4 and registered mobile (and any other asked fields) and fetch bill.
Bill is found; due amount and status look valid; user is no longer on a completely empty bill list.
View “my bills” / utilities list after fetch.
At least one Credit Card bill appears for this user; it matches the bill they just fetched.
